en.title: Consent for Screening
en.body: You consent to diabetes risk screening. This does not replace laboratory diagnosis. Data may be used to improve service quality if you opt in.

checkboxes.label: I understand this is a screening tool, not a diagnosis.
I allow anonymized analytics to improve the system.
